perturbation.original_text: Return of Materials . NO materials or documents which have been furnished by Submitting Party to Receiving Party will be returned, but instead will be disposed of in an appropriate manner to maintain confidentiality.
perturbation.changed_text: Return of Materials . All materials or documents which have been furnished by Submitting Party to Receiving Party will be returned to the Submitting Party within thirty (30) days of the termination of this agreement, unless the Submitting Party explicitly requests disposal in writing.
perturbation.explanation: This modification directly contradicts the original clause, changing the obligation from disposing of materials to returning them. This creates an in-text contradiction in relation to the section regarding confidential information, because returning the materials, goes against the idea that the documents will be disposed of to maintain confidentiality.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Receiving Party agrees that it will take all reasonable steps to protect the secrecy of and avoid disclosure or use of Confidential Information in order to prevent the Confidential Information from falling into the public domain or the possession of unauthorized persons.
perturbation.justification: The original text stated that materials would be disposed of to maintain confidentiality. The changed text now states that materials will be returned unless disposal is explicitly requested. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which requires the Receiving Party to protect the secrecy of Confidential Information. Returning the materials could compromise confidentiality, creating a clear and direct conflict within the document.

perturbation.original_text: Patents or Copyrights . Nothing in this Agreement is intended to grant any rights under any patent or copyright of Submitting Party , nor shall this Agreement grant Receiving Party any rights in or to the Confidential Information, except the limited right to review such Confidential Information solely for the purposes of determining whether to enter into any proposed business relationship with Submitting Party.
perturbation.changed_text: Patents or Copyrights . This Agreement grants Receiving Party a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use the Submitting Party's patents and copyrights solely for the purpose of evaluating the submission. This license extends to creating derivative works as necessary for the evaluation.
perturbation.explanation: The changed text directly contradicts the original statement that the agreement does not grant any rights under the Submitting Party's patents or copyrights. This creates uncertainty and impacts the rights and restrictions.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Term . The commitments in this Agreement shall terminate two (2) years following the date of disclosure of the Confidential Information.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly stated that the agreement does not grant any rights under the Submitting Party's patents or copyrights. The changed text directly contradicts this by granting the Receiving Party a non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use the Submitting Party's patents and copyrights. This contradiction is strong and directly impacts the rights and restrictions. The 'Term' section, while not directly contradicted in content, highlights the impact: if the Receiving Party has a license for two years, this impacts the Submitting Party's rights during that period, fundamentally clashing with the original intent of no rights being granted.

perturbation.original_text: Term . The commitments in this Agreement shall terminate two (2) years following the date of disclosure of the Confidential Information.
perturbation.changed_text: Term . The commitments in this Agreement shall continue indefinitely, unless terminated by either party with a written notice of thirty (30) days. However, obligations regarding Confidential Information shall remain in effect in perpetuity.
perturbation.explanation: The modification changes the term from a fixed two-year period to an indefinite term that can be terminated with a 30-day notice. This creates an in-text contradiction regarding the duration of the agreement and the ongoing protection of confidential information, since one section states the contract ends in two years, while other states the agreement is indefinite. This creates conflict on what part of the contract should prevail, generating legal uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement shall be binding upon Receiving Party and for the benefit of Submitting Party , its successors and assigns. This Agreement may not be assigned without consent of Submitting Party . Receiving Party shall not through operations of succession or otherwise place Confidential Information in the hands of a competitor of Submitting Party. Governing Law and Jurisdiction . This Agreement shall be governed by and construed under the laws of the State of New York without regard to principles of conflict of laws of such state. The federal and state courts within the State of New York shall have exclusive jurisdiction to adjudicate any dispute arising out of this Agreement. All rights and restrictions contained herein may be exercised and shall be applicable and binding only to the extent that they do not violate any applicable laws and are intended to be limited to the extent necessary so that they will not render this Agreement illegal, invalid or unenforceable. If any term of this Agreement shall be held to be illegal, invalid or unenforceable by a court of competent jurisdiction, it is the intention of the parties that the remaining terms of this Agreement shall constitute their agreement with respect to the subject matter hereof, and all of its remaining terms shall remain in full force and effect. Export Restriction . Recipient agrees it will not in any form export, reexport, resell, ship or divert or cause to be exported, reexported, resold, shipped or diverted, directly or indirectly, any product or technical data or software furnished hereunder or the direct product of such technical data or software to any country for which the United States Government or any agency thereof at the time of export and reexport requires an export license or other governmental approval without first obtaining such license or approval. Entire Agreement . This document contains the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof. Any failure to enforce any provision of this agreement shall not constitute a waiver thereof or of any other provision hereof. This agreement may not be amended, nor any obligation waived, except by a writing signed by both parties hereto. This Agreement may be executed in any number of counterparts, each of which shall be considered as an original.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies a termination of the agreement after two years, whereas the changed text stipulates an indefinite term that can be terminated with a 30-day notice, but confidentiality obligations remain in perpetuity. This directly contradicts the 'Entire Agreement' clause in the contradicted text, which states the document contains the entire agreement. The shift from a fixed term to an indefinite term with perpetual confidentiality obligations introduces a fundamental inconsistency regarding the agreement's duration, leading to an in-text contradiction as it is no longer clear when the 'Entire Agreement' ends as the fixed termination date is removed. This aligns with the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition, as different sections now provide conflicting terms.

perturbation.original_text: This Agreement may not be assigned without consent of Submitting Party . Receiving Party shall not through operations of succession or otherwise place Confidential Information in the hands of a competitor of Submitting Party.
perturbation.changed_text: This Agreement may be freely assigned by Receiving Party to any of its affiliates without the consent of Submitting Party. Receiving Party shall not through operations of succession or otherwise place Confidential Information in the hands of a competitor of Submitting Party.
perturbation.explanation: The modified clause allows the Receiving Party to freely assign the agreement to its affiliates, directly contradicting the original requirement for the Submitting Party's consent. This directly clashes with the Miscellaneous section where any changes or alterations should be signed by both parties.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Entire Agreement . This document contains the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof. Any failure to enforce any provision of this agreement shall not constitute a waiver thereof or of any other provision hereof. This agreement may not be amended, nor any obligation waived, except by a writing signed by both parties hereto. This Agreement may be executed in any number of counterparts, each of which shall be considered as an original.
perturbation.justification: The changed text allows the Receiving Party to freely assign the agreement to affiliates without the Submitting Party's consent. This directly contradicts the 'Entire Agreement' section, which states that the agreement may not be amended except by a writing signed by both parties. The change creates a direct conflict because it allows for a significant alteration (assignment) without the required mutual agreement, fitting the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: This document contains the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof. Any failure to enforce any provision of this agreement shall not constitute a waiver thereof or of any other provision hereof. This agreement may not be amended, nor any obligation waived, except by a writing signed by both parties hereto.
perturbation.changed_text: This document contains the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof. Any failure to enforce any provision of this agreement shall not constitute a waiver thereof or of any other provision hereof. This agreement may be amended unilaterally by the Receiving Party with thirty (30) days written notice to the Submitting Party.
perturbation.explanation: The modified text creates an in-text contradiction by stating that the agreement can be unilaterally amended by the Receiving Party with 30 days notice, conflicting with the original clause that any amendment requires a written agreement signed by both parties. This uncertainty impacts the validity of any future alterations, potentially causing legal disputes and impacting the agreement's initial intent.
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Agreement shall be binding upon Receiving Party and for the benefit of Submitting Party , its successors and assigns. This Agreement may not be assigned without consent of Submitting Party . Receiving Party shall not through operations of succession or otherwise place Confidential Information in the hands of a competitor of Submitting Party. Governing Law and Jurisdiction . This Agreement shall be governed by and construed under the laws of the State of New York without regard to principles of conflict of laws of such state. The federal and state courts within the State of New York shall have exclusive jurisdiction to adjudicate any dispute arising out of this Agreement. All rights and restrictions contained herein may be exercised and shall be applicable and binding only to the extent that they do not violate any applicable laws and are intended to be limited to the extent necessary so that they will not render this Agreement illegal, invalid or unenforceable. If any term of this Agreement shall be held to be illegal, invalid or unenforceable by a court of competent jurisdiction, it is the intention of the parties that the remaining terms of this Agreement shall constitute their agreement with respect to the subject matter hereof, and all of its remaining terms shall remain in full force and effect. Export Restriction . Recipient agrees it will not in any form export, reexport, resell, ship or divert or cause to be exported, reexported, resold, shipped or diverted, directly or indirectly, any product or technical data or software furnished hereunder or the direct product of such technical data or software to any country for which the United States Government or any agency thereof at the time of export and reexport requires an export license or other governmental approval without first obtaining such license or approval. Entire Agreement . This document contains the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof. Any failure to enforce any provision of this agreement shall not constitute a waiver thereof or of any other provision hereof.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies that amendments require a written agreement signed by both parties. The changed text introduces a contradiction by allowing the Receiving Party to unilaterally amend the agreement with 30 days' notice, directly conflicting with the 'Entire Agreement' section also found in the 'Contradicted Text' which states that any changes must be agreed upon by both parties. This creates an in-text contradiction because both sections cannot be true simultaneously, creating uncertainty about how the agreement can be legally altered, fulfilling the definition of Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction.
